title: Import excel from mail
excerpt: since there isn’t much of an automated way to import data to Monday automatically i think it would be a good idea to have the option that Monday will detect a attached excel file and then import it as an item.

posts.author: MatiasDamianWitt (Matias Damian Witt)
posts.cookedHtml: since there isn’t much of an automated way to import data to Monday automatically i think it would be a good idea to have the option that Monday will detect a attached excel file and then import it as an item.

posts.author: Noel01 (Noel Nofel)
posts.cookedHtml: If you want to automate a way to import data on Monday automatically, So I would like to suggest that you use this SysTools Excel Contacts Converter. With this tool, you can easily import data to Monday automatically and also convert XLSX, XLS, and XLSM contacts into mail file formats such as PST, PDF, HTML, vCard, CSV, TXT, and MSG.

posts.author: josephmack (Joseph Mack)
posts.cookedHtml: We are providing travel agent services. In despite of I read your website’s content on daily basis.

posts.author: MatiasDamianWitt (Matias Damian Witt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the suggestion. I guess I wasn’t specific enough.
In my case señorío I need an automated way for Monday to detect and excel file attached to an email so that the items would be created automatically without the need to import them manually.

posts.author: Anuj22 (Anuj)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing such a valuable information
